figures.caption: Table 3: Scoring dimensions used by the judge model. Exact judge instructions appear in Appendix B.
Figure 2: Ratchet experiment results. The reverted condition restores visible identity but not baseline behavior: treatment trait remains elevated while soul alignment falls sharply.

Figure 1: Illustrative technical profile of the mutability stack. Layer 3 mutates fastest in many real systems, but its high observability and reversibility keep direct governance load low. Memory and weight layers dominate because they are harder to inspect and harder to undo.
Table 1: Core notation used throughout the paper.
